name: Bambini Crostini
lore:
Lore of Bambini Crostini
                                    


Bambini Crostini is an absurd and iconic figure from the Italian Brainrot universe. As the name suggests, the character combines the childish (“bambini”) with a croissant-like shape (“crostini”). But the "bambini" part can refer to the deer with the Disney movie Bambi.
In the picture, Bambini Crostini is seen as a brown deer with a childish face and a body reminiscent of a crispy croissant. Her eyes stare into nothingness, and the whole thing exudes a strange mix of cuteness and disturbing energy – classic Brainrot.
Original (Italian)
Bambini crostini. Vesuvio gondola amore strada vespa duomo mercato azzuro ciao piazza tricolore ah già ah mare terraza campanile fiat 500 tarantella dolcevita giardino lago di como firenze profumo mandolino uh alba.'
Translated (English)
Bambini Crostini. Vesuvius gondola love street vespa cathedral blue market hello tricolor square ah yes ah sea terrace bell tower fiat 500 tarantella dolcevita garden lake como florence perfume mandolin uh dawn.
